C

calculateNumOfCompletion(Kingdom) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.model.cards.objective.DiagonalDown
The calculateNumOfCompletion(kingdom) method receives the kingdom of the player as a parameter and calculates the number of times that the objective is satisfied, returning said number.
calculateNumOfCompletion(Kingdom) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.model.cards.objective.DiagonalUp
The calculateNumOfCompletion(kingdom) method receives the kingdom of the player as a parameter and calculates the number of times that the objective is satisfied, returning said number.
calculateNumOfCompletion(Kingdom) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.model.cards.objective.LShape
The calculateNumOfCompletion(kingdom) method receives the kingdom of the player as a parameter and calculates the number of times that the objective is satisfied, returning said number.
calculateNumOfCompletion(Kingdom) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.model.cards.objective.ObjectiveCard
The calculateNumOfCompletion(kingdom) method receives the kingdom of the player as a parameter and calculates the number of times that the objective is satisfied, returning said number.
calculateNumOfCompletion(Kingdom) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.model.cards.objective.PlacementBoundObjective
The calculateNumOfCompletion(kingdom) method receives the kingdom of the player as a parameter and calculates the number of times that the objective is satisfied, returning said number.
calculateNumOfCompletion(Kingdom) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.model.cards.objective.ResourcesBoundObjective
The calculateNumOfCompletion(kingdom) method receives the kingdom of the player as a parameter and calculates the number of times that the object is satisfied, returning said number.
Card - Class in it.polimi.ingsw.am37.model.cards
The Card abstract class represents the idea of a generic card of the game and serves as a blueprint for more specific cards.
Card(int) - Constructor for class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.model.cards.Card
The Card(id) constructor sets the value of the id attribute.
cardColourThatTriggersCheck - Variable in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.model.cards.objective.PlacementBoundObjective
The cardColourThatTriggersCheck attribute contains the colour of the card that will trigger the check on neighbour cards in the calculateNumOfCompletion(k) method.
CardCreator - Class in it.polimi.ingsw.am37.model.cards
The CardCreator class creates the list of Cards using a .json parser from the Gson library.
CardCreator() - Constructor for class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.model.cards.CardCreator
The constructor CardCreator() creates the Gson object that will be used to parse the .json file.
cards - Variable in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.model.decks.Deck
The list of cards that represents the deck; it has package visibility.
changeScene(String, String, ActionEvent) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.GUI.controllers.GUIController
Changes the scene to the one specified by the fxmlName and controller parameters.
CHOOSE_LOBBY - Enum constant in enum class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.ViewState
The view is in the state of waiting for a player to choose a lobby.
CHOOSE_OBJECTIVE - Enum constant in enum class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.ViewState
The view is in the state of waiting for the player to choose an objective.
CHOOSE_TOKEN - Enum constant in enum class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.ViewState
The view is in the state of waiting for the player to choose a token.
chooseObjective(int, String, int) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.server.RMIServer
This method is used to make the player choose an objective.
chooseObjective(int, String, int) - Method in interface it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.server.RMIServerStub
This method is used to make a player chose an objective.
chooseObjective(String, int) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.virtualserver.RMIVirtualServer
This method is used to make the player choose the objective.
chooseObjective(String, int) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.virtualserver.TCPVirtualServer
This method sends a message to the server to choose an objective.
chooseObjective(String, int) - Method in interface it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.virtualserver.VirtualServer
This method is used to make the player choose the objective.
ChooseObjectiveMessage - Class in it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.messages.initialization
Message sent by the client to the server to choose an objective card.
ChooseObjectiveMessage(MessageId, String, int) - Constructor for class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.messages.initialization.ChooseObjectiveMessage
Constructor of the class.
choosePrivateObjective(int) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.GUI.GUIView
This method is used to choose a private objective.
ChoosePrivateObjectiveController - Class in it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.GUI.controllers
Controller for the choose private objective scene.
ChoosePrivateObjectiveController() - Constructor for class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.GUI.controllers.ChoosePrivateObjectiveController
 
chooseStartCard(String) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.GUI.GUIView
This method is used to place the start card.
ChooseStartCardController - Class in it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.GUI.controllers
Controller for the choose start card scene.
ChooseStartCardController() - Constructor for class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.GUI.controllers.ChooseStartCardController
 
chooseToken(int, String, Token) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.server.RMIServer
This method is used to make the player choose a token.
chooseToken(int, String, Token) - Method in interface it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.server.RMIServerStub
This method is used to make a player chose a token.
chooseToken(Token) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.GUI.GUIView
This method is used to choose a token.
chooseToken(String, Token) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.virtualserver.RMIVirtualServer
This method is used to make the player choose the token.
chooseToken(String, Token) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.virtualserver.TCPVirtualServer
This method sends a message to the server to choose a token.
chooseToken(String, Token) - Method in interface it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.virtualserver.VirtualServer
This method is used to make the player choose the token.
ChooseTokenController - Class in it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.GUI.controllers
This class is the controller for the chooseToken.fxml file It allows the player to choose a token from the available ones and sends it to the server.
ChooseTokenController() - Constructor for class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.GUI.controllers.ChooseTokenController
 
ChooseTokenMessage - Class in it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.messages.initialization
This message is sent by the client to the server to choose the token that the player wants to use during the game.
ChooseTokenMessage(MessageId, String, Token) - Constructor for class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.messages.initialization.ChooseTokenMessage
Constructor of the class.
ClientConnectionInterface - Interface in it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.client
the ClientConnectionInterface is an Interface implemented in the ClientRMI class and in the ClientTCP class to have the startClient method in both of them.
ClientHandler - Class in it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.server
This class is used to handle the connection with the client.
ClientHandler(Socket, MultipleMatchesHandler) - Constructor for class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.server.ClientHandler
The constructor of the class.
ClientInterface - Interface in it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.server
Interface that defines the methods that the server can call on the client.
ClientMain - Class in it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.client
the ClientMain class handles the first connection of the client to the server.
ClientMain() - Constructor for class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.client.ClientMain
 
ClientRMI - Class in it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.client
the ClientRMI class implements the RMIClientSkeleton and implements the method called by the player during the game.
ClientRMI(String, int, View) - Constructor for class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.client.ClientRMI
ClientRMI is a setter method for the server's port and ip, and the for the view.
ClientSideGameModel - Class in it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.clientmodel
This class is the client-side representation of the game model.
ClientSideGameModel() - Constructor for class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.clientmodel.ClientSideGameModel
Creates a new client-side game model.
ClientSidePlayer - Class in it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.clientmodel
This class is a copy of the Player class, but it is used only for the client side.
ClientSidePlayer(String) - Constructor for class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.clientmodel.ClientSidePlayer
Constructor of the class.
ClientTCP - Class in it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.client
the ClientTCP class implements the ClientConnectionInterface and handles all the messages sent by the player.
ClientTCP(String, int, View) - Constructor for class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.client.ClientTCP
ClientTCP is a setter method for the server's port and ip, and the for the view.
Corner - Class in it.polimi.ingsw.am37.model.sides
The Corner class represents the concept of a generic corner of one of the sides of the card.
Corner(boolean, Resource) - Constructor for class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.model.sides.Corner
The Corner(isVisible, resource) constructor assigns the values given as parameters to the isVisible and resource attributes, and it sets the linkedSide to null.
CORNER - Enum constant in enum class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.model.sides.Bonus
The Corner Bonus assigns 2 points for every Corner covered by this Card placement.
CREATE - Enum constant in enum class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.messages.MessageId
CREATE message type
CREATE_JOIN - Enum constant in enum class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.ViewState
The view is in the initial state.
createButtonClicked(ActionEvent) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.GUI.controllers.CreateGameController
Handles the creation of a new lobby.
createButtonClicked(ActionEvent) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.GUI.controllers.LoginController
This method is called when the user clicks on the create button It changes the scene to the createGame.fxml file
createCards(String, Type) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.model.cards.CardCreator
The createCards(fileName) method is called by the initializeDeck(cc) method and creates the cards by reading the .json file given as a parameter.
createGame(RMIClientSkeleton, int, String, int) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.server.RMIServer
This method is used to create a new game.
createGame(RMIClientSkeleton, int, String, int) - Method in interface it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.server.RMIServerStub
This method is used to create a new game.
createGameClick(ActionEvent) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.GUI.controllers.JoinGameController
Method to change the scene to the "create game" scene
CreateGameController - Class in it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.GUI.controllers
This class is the controller for the createGame.fxml file.
CreateGameController() - Constructor for class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.GUI.controllers.CreateGameController
 
createHand() - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.model.game.GameModel
The method createHand sets the starting cards the players will have in their hand right after placing the start card.
createLobby(String, int) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.GUI.GUIView
This method is used to create a lobby.
createLobby(String, int) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.virtualserver.RMIVirtualServer
This method is used to create a new lobby.
createLobby(String, int) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.virtualserver.TCPVirtualServer
This method sends a message to the server to create a lobby.
createLobby(String, int) - Method in interface it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.virtualserver.VirtualServer
This method is used to create a new lobby.
createPosition(Position) - Method in enum class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.model.cards.objective.Direction
The createPosition(p) method creates a new Position based on the direction that calls the method.
CreationMessage - Class in it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.messages.lobby
This message is sent by the client to the server when the client wants to create a new game.
CreationMessage(MessageId, String, int) - Constructor for class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.messages.lobby.CreationMessage
Constructor.
